IT-SPARKS

Functions for Students

You can select courses and submit them for advisor approval.

You can track advisor approvals and your registration status.

You can view your weekly course schedule.

You can view your midterm, final, and make-up exam grades.

You can perform online payment transactions securely.

You can update your address and contact information.

You can follow academic announcements regularly.

Functions for Academic Staff

You can review and approve students' course selections during the advising process.

You can view lists and grades of students registered in your courses.

You can update the academic calendar and exam dates.

Frequently Asked Questions

Select your role

Student

Academic Staff

Why can't I see my courses?

Your course registration may not be completed or your advisor approval may not have been received. Check the registration period in the academic calendar.

I submitted my assignment but it doesn't appear in the system. Why?

The assignment upload deadline may have passed. Check the assignment announcement on your course page or consult your instructor.

I forgot my password, what should I do?

You can request a new password by contacting

[email protected]

with your KHAS email address.

My students do not appear on the advising screen.

Student registration processes may not be completed yet. Please contact the Student Affairs Unit.

How can I enter course grades?

You can enter your grades from the "Grade Entry" tab on your course page via SPARKS.

How is new student advising assigned?

Advisor assignments are made by Student Affairs. Please contact the faculty secretariat for missing lists.
